title: A Visit to Friends
description:
Make A Visit to Friends in these four RPG inspired dioramas. Step into the shoes of four unique characters, each with their own dilemmas and absurd circumstances.

((Warning: This game contains quick flashing lights))

• Help repair antiquated transportation

• Get told stories by a robot

• Search for poultry

• Talk to Spirits

• Dive into your subconscious

• Collect taxes

• Grapple with life's uncertainties

• Become lost

• Chase bunnies

• Buy candy

• Forget to water your plants

All this and more!
description_short: A Visit to Friends is a collection of four dioramas, each with their own themes, characters, and puzzles to solve. Catch chickens, put in a day's work, and explore your own subconscious through heterodox methods. All this and more is in store when you take A Visit to Friends.
